source.sqlReaderQuery:
Select  D.InboundkillReason,F.* from EDW.FACT_Inbound_Queue_log F 
Left join EDW.DIM_Inbound_Kill_reason D on F.InboundKillreasonId=D.InboundkillreasonId
Where F.Division='MAC' and F.Datereceived >=Dateadd(d,-90,getdate())

With AP_LEADS As (
Select 
T1.Active_Prospect_Lead_Id, T1.Email, T1.Phone_1, 
T1.Submitted_At AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time' as Submitted_At, --converting utc to central
T1.created_at AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE 'Central Standard Time' as Created_at,
T1.Division, T1.Outcome, T1.Active_Prospect_Source_name, T1.Product, 
azurecreditfilterv20debug ,  T2.comments, 
trestlephoneintelligencecarrier, trestlephoneintelligencecountrycode,  trestlephoneintelligencecountryname, 
trestlephoneintelligenceisprepaid, trestlephoneintelligenceisvalid, trestlephoneintelligencelinetype,
trestlephoneintelligenceoutcome, trestlephoneintelligenceactivityscore

from ODS.AP_Leads T1 Left join ODS.AP_Leads_TrestleFields T2 on T2.LeadId=T1.Active_Prospect_lead_id

)

Select 
	Division, LP_CustomerId, LP_LeadId, AP_LeadId, 
	First_Name, Last_name, Address1, Addr_City, Addr_State, Addr_Zip, Phone, Email,   
	EntryDate,LP_ProductId, LP_product_name, AP_ProductName,
	SRS_ID, SourceGroup As LP_SourceGroup, Source as LP_Source, sub_source as LP_SubSource,
	INQ_datereceived,
	Inq_Sender as InboundQueue_Sender, Flag,
	Active_Prospect_Source_name as AP_Source,
	Rank, District, 
	Appointment_Set, Lead_issued, Demo_Completed, Sold, BTD_Flag, JobCancelled_Flag, GrossSalesAmount, 
	Versium_creditScore, Experian_CreditRating, Renuity_creditRating, Contacted, 
	DispositionId, Disposition, DispositionCategoryId, Uni_DispositionComments, 
	JobStatus, UNI_jobStatus, UNI_jobstatusCategory,

	---AP fields
	azurecreditfilterv20debug , comments, 
	trestlephoneintelligencecarrier, trestlephoneintelligencecountrycode,  trestlephoneintelligencecountryname, 
	trestlephoneintelligenceisprepaid, trestlephoneintelligenceisvalid, trestlephoneintelligencelinetype,
	trestlephoneintelligenceoutcome, trestlephoneintelligenceactivityscore

from (
Select * from (
SELECT   
    -- Identification Attributes       
    distinct
	lds.Division,
    cst.CustomerID as LP_CustomerId,
    lds.LeadID LP_LeadID,
	AP.Active_Prospect_Lead_id As AP_LeadID,--- AP1.Active_prospect_Lead_ID as AP_LeadId1,
    LOWER(cst.FirstName) first_name,          
    LOWER(cst.LastName) last_name,          
    LOWER(cst.Address1) address1,          
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.City, ''), 'unknown')) addr_city,          
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.State, ''), 'unknown')) addr_state,          
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(cst.Zip, ''), 'unknown')) addr_zip,          
    cst.Phone phone,          
    LOWER(cst.Email) email,                  
   -- RENUITY LEAD ATTRIBUTES          

    lds.EntryDate ,        
	AP.Created_at as AP_Created_At_date,
	Inq.DateReceived as INQ_datereceived,
	Row_number() over(partition by lds.LeadId order by AP.Created_at) as Rn,

    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(Case when lds.Productid like '%-' then j.ProductId else lds.Productid end, ''), 'unknown')) LP_productid,       
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(Case when lds.Productid like '%-' then p1.ProductName else p.ProductName end , ''), 'unknown')) LP_product_name,  
	
	LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(AP.Product, ''), 'unknown')) as AP_ProductName, 

	LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(Sg.SourceGroup, ''), 'unknown')) SourceGroup, 
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(srs.SourceCode, ''), 'unknown')) source,       
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(srs.LeadSubSource, ''), 'unknown')) sub_source,    
	LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(lds.LeadSubsourceId, ''), 'unknown')) as SRS_ID,

	Inq.Source as Inq_Source, Inq.Sender as Inq_Sender, 
	Case when Coalesce(Inq.Sender,'')  like '%AP' then 'Digital' else 'Non-Digital' end as Flag, 

	AP.Active_Prospect_Source_name,


    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(rnk.rank, ''), 'unknown')) rank,      
	
    LOWER(ISNULL(NULLIF(case when lds.SalesDistrictId like '%-' then sds1.LongName 
							 when lds.BranchId like '%-' then sds2.LongName
							 else sds.LongName end 
						, ''), 'unknown')) district,    
	
     lds.ApptSet as Appointment_Set,
     lds.issued as lead_issued,
     lds.sat as Demo_Completed,
     lds.Sold,      
     CASE WHEN JS.[UNI_JobStatusCategory] = 'Bank Turn Down' then 1 Else 0 end as BTD_Flag,
     CASE WHEN JS.[UNI_JobStatusCategory] = 'Cancelled' then 1 Else 0 end as JobCancelled_Flag,
     lds.GrossSalesAmount,

     --rrt.[LeadScore],
     rrt.[CreditScore] as Versium_CreditScore,
     rrt.[Experian_CreditRating],
	 Case when lds.Division='PBC' then rrt.[CreditScore] else rrt.Ren_creditRating end as Renuity_creditRating ,


	COALESCE(f9.AnsweredCall,0) AS CONTACTED ,
     d.[DispositionID], d.[Disposition],d.[DispositionCategoryID],
     d.[UNI_Disposition],d.[UNI_DispositionComments],
	 js.JobStatus, 
	 js.UNI_JobStatus,js.[UNI_JobStatusCategory],
	 
	 ---AP fields
	azurecreditfilterv20debug , AP.comments, 
	trestlephoneintelligencecarrier, trestlephoneintelligencecountrycode,  trestlephoneintelligencecountryname, 
	trestlephoneintelligenceisprepaid, trestlephoneintelligenceisvalid, trestlephoneintelligencelinetype,
	trestlephoneintelligenceoutcome, trestlephoneintelligenceactivityscore
	
	 

FROM          
    edw.fact_lead lds with (nolock)         
    Left Outer join edw.dim_product p on lds.Productid = p.productid
    Left Outer join edw.dim_disposition d on lds.dispositionid = d.dispositionid
    LEFT OUTER JOIN edw.dim_Customer cst on lds.[CustomerID] = cst.[CustomerID]         
    LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds with (nolock) on lds.[SalesDistrictID] =  sds.[SalesDistrictID]          
    LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_RANK] rnk  with (nolock)  on lds.[RankID] =  rnk.[RankID]          
    LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs with (nolock)  on lds.[LeadSubSourceID] = srs.[LeadSubSourceID]    

	LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_Source] s with (nolock) on srs.LeadsourceId=s.LeadsourceId
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_LEAD_Source_group] sg with (nolock) on s.sourcegroupId=Sg.LeadSourceGroupId


    Left outer join [EDW].Fact_job j on j.leadid=lds.leadid
    Left Outer join [EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] js on j.[JobStatusID] = js.[JobStatusID]
    left outer join [EDW].[DIM_RENUITYRATINGS] rrt on rrt.leadid = lds.leadid
	Left join EDW.Fact_inbound_Queue_Log Inq on  Lds.LeadId=Inq.LeadId

	Left Outer join edw.dim_product p1 on j.Productid = p1.productid
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds1 with (nolock) on lds.BranchId =  sds1.[SalesDistrictID]  
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [EDW].[DIM_SALES_DISTRICT] sds2 with (nolock) on j.ProductionBranchId =  sds2.[SalesDistrictID]  

    left outer join 
		(
			SELECT DISTINCT
				A.Division,
				A.number1 
				,B.AnsweredCall
				FROM [EDW].[FACT_FIVE9_CALL_LOG_ALL_NEW] A
				JOIN [EDW].[DIM_FIVE9_CALL_RESULT_DISPOSITION] B
				ON A.CallResultID = B.CallResultID
				WHERE AnsweredCall=1
				AND CAST(DATE AS DATE)>='2025-01-01'
		) f9 on --f9.number1 = cst.phone 
			CAST(f9.number1 AS nvarchar(50))= LTRIM(RTRIM(cst.phone)) AND f9.Division = lds.Division

	Left join AP_LEADS AP on AP.Submitted_At >='2025-01-01' and AP.Division=Inq.Division 
						and	AP.phone_1= Inq.Phone and AP.Email=Inq.Email and  cast(AP.Submitted_At as date)= Cast(Inq.DateReceived as date) --converting utc to central
						and AP.Outcome='success' and AP.Active_Prospect_Source_name= Replace(Inq.Sender,' | AP','')


WHERE 
lds.EntryDate between '2025-01-01' and '2025-12-10' and Lds.Division='MAC'
)a where rn=1
)b



--where AP_LeadID is null  
-- and Inq_Sender like '%AP'
--LP_LeadId='FHI-1008809'--164458--116303
--114037 Cast(dateadd(hour,-5, AP.Created_At) as date)--123429
--52902--39344 PB --34288 
Order by EntryDate desc

Select  L.Division,M.TX_Channel,M.TX_SourceGroup, M.TX_SourceCode, L.EntryDate,L.LeadId, L.LeadSubsourceId , U.UnitCpl--, U.Datereceived,U.LeadId
from EDW.Fact_lead L
Left join EDW.DIM_MKTNG_SUB_Source_mapping M on L.LeadSubsourceId=M.LeadSubsourceId
Left join EDW.FACT_UTM_Parameters_Value U on L.LeadID=U.LeadId
Where --L.Division='MAC' and
Eomonth(U.Datereceived) between '2025-01-31' and '2025-09-01' and U.UnitCpl is not null 
Order by 3,4 desc

Select  Z.Division, BranchZipID, 
Z.ProductGroupId, PG.ProductGroup,P.ProductId,P.LongDescription as ProductName
,Z.BranchId,  ZipCode,B.LongName as BranchName, 
M.MarketDescription  from 
EDW.DIM_BRANCH_ZIP Z 
Left join EDW.DIM_BRanch B on Z.BranchID=B.BranchId
Left join EDW.DIM_REPorting_Market M on M.ReportingMarketId=B.ReportingMarketID
Left join EDW.DIM_Product_Group PG on Z.ProductGroupId=PG.ProductGroupId
Left join EDW.DIM_Product P on PG.ProductGroupId=P.ProductGroupId
